data.description: IRANIAN NAVY COMMANDER STATES US AIRCRAFT CARRIER LINCOLN IS BEING WATCHED BY IRAN.
IRAN'S NAVY CHIEF IRANI STATES THAT THE USS LINCOLN STRIKE GROUP IS BEING WATCHED AT ALL TIMES AND WILL BE ATTACKED IF IT GETS WITHIN MISSILE RANGE.

data.title: GAC's First Overseas Service Brand Launches at Bangkok Motor Show, Thailand Action 2.0 Commences
data.description: The 47th Bangkok International Motor Show commenced on March 23, 2026. GAC INTERNATIONAL introduced its inaugural overseas service brand, GAC CARE, emphasizing "service upgrading." The company revealed the complete details of its "Thailand Action 2.0" upgrade at the event.

data.title: XRP at $1.42 eyes $1.50-$1.60 by April 2026. With RSI 48.37 and resistance at $1.45, a breakout could lead to rally. (Read More)
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $1.42 with a relatively neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 48.37. It faces a significant resistance level at $1.45. Analysis indicates the possibility of a rally to the $1.50-$1.60 range in the next 4-6 weeks if a breakout occurs.

data.title: BNB price to hit $680 resistance by early April 2026. Short-term target: $664-$680, Medium-term forecast: $620-$700.
data.description: Summary of BNB Price Predictions: BNB is projected to reach $664-$680 in the short term (1 week) and remain within the $620-$700 range in the medium term (1 month). A bullish breakout is expected if BNB surpasses $679, marked as the Upper Bollinger Band level.

data.title: Solar A/S: No 7 2026 Major shareholder announcement
data.description: In accordance with Section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, Solar A/S has been notified by UBS Group AG that they currently hold 409,991 Class B shares of DKK 100 each in Solar, representing a 5.12% stake in the company. This ownership percentage marks an increase from the previously reported holding of 5.09% on February 12, 2026.

data.title: Dr. Walter Koroshetz Named to American Parkinson Disease Association Scientific Advisory Board
data.description: Dr. Walter Koroshetz, a distinguished neurologist and neuroscientist, has been appointed by the American Parkinson Disease Association (APDA) to assist in assessing and overseeing the allocation of funds for Parkinson's research. This esteemed leader is known for his expertise in the field and has previously held significant roles. The APDA revealed this development on March 25, 2026. This collaboration aims to leverage Dr. Koroshetz's experience to make informed decisions regarding research funding for Parkinson's, benefiting from his valuable insights.

data.title: SOL price aims for $105-110 by April 2026 with current price at $92.51, expected to break resistance at $95.84 soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana is currently trading at $92.51 and shows a positive technical outlook as it remains above important moving averages. Analysts predict that the price of SOL could reach a target range of $105-110 in the next four weeks, especially as it surpasses the resistance level at $95.84.

data.title: Stora Enso updates comparative figures following changes to segment reporting
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Stora Enso Oyj announced a change in its segment reporting starting from January 1, 2026. The Group restated comparative figures for its segment reporting for 2025. The adjustments were made to enhance transparency and accuracy in financial reporting. This modification impacts the way financial information is presented to stakeholders. Stora Enso aims to provide a clearer picture of its performance across different business segments. This change reflects the company's commitment to upholding high standards of corporate governance.

data.title: atNorth Heat Reuse Partnership with Kesko Goes Live, Delivering Recycled Data Center Heat to Finnish Retail Store
data.description: In Helsinki on March 25, 2026, atNorth, a top Nordic provider of high-density colocation and built-to-suit data centers, revealed that its collaboration with Kesko Corporation on heat reuse became operational in November 2025. This initiative involves utilizing waste heat generated at atNorth's FIN02 facility.

data.title: MirZyme Appoints Lindsey Carnett as U.S. Global Ambassador for Women's Health Innovation
data.description: In Birmingham, UK on March 25, 2026, MirZyme Therapeutics, a biotech firm dedicated to improving maternal health, revealed the selection of Lindsey Carnett, CEO of Marketing Maven Public Relations, Inc., as their Global Ambassador.
